task_title: Create the first Claude Code worker runbook
task_objective: Have Claude Code create one bounded runbook file that explains the exact operating procedure for the PCC worker cycle in this repo, using the current directive and returning evidence to .cockpit/result/worker-result.md.
completion_criteria: A runbook file is created that explains the Claude Code worker procedure for this repo.
The runbook states what Claude reads first, what file it writes, and the required evidence format.
The runbook makes the handoff contract system-owned rather than owner-driven.
The task stays within V1 lean scope and does not introduce app code yet.

allowed: Create one runbook file describing the Claude worker procedure.
Update docs directly related to the worker handoff procedure.
Define the worker return path and expected evidence format.
forbidden: Do not build app code yet.
Do not add paid API dependencies.
Do not introduce broad orchestration or automation.
Do not change canonical project goals or verification verdicts.
Do not require the owner to manually restate or carry the worker instructions.

required_evidence: Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched.
next_action: Run the first bounded Claude Code task and capture the returned result file for verification.
